fact: Article 169 empowers the Parliament to create or abolish a Legislative Council if the State Assembly passes a resolution by a special majority.
relevance: Frequently asked in SSC CGL Tier I/II statement-based questions.

fact: The Governor’s ordinance-making power (Article 213) requires legislative approval within 6 weeks of the reassembly of the State Legislature.
relevance: High-yield comparison point with the President's Ordinance power (Article 123).

fact: Part IX (Panchayats) contains Articles 243 to 243O and the 11th Schedule containing 29 subjects.
relevance: Direct match-the-following and factual question source.

fact: Part IX-A (Municipalities) contains Articles 243P to 243ZG and the 12th Schedule containing 18 subjects.
relevance: Core memory point for Tier I speed tests.
